scripts.dev:infra: docker compose --project-directory . -f deployment/docker-compose.yml up -d postgres redis --wait && bash scripts/ensure-intelligence-databases.sh && docker compose --project-directory . -f deployment/docker-compose.yml up -d --wait && npm run seed
scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent -c blue,cyan,green "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n ui,bff,agent,mcp -c blue,cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:ui" "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run langgraph dev --port 8133
